rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MAYO et al VS. CADELINIA & LEUNG, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Chicago Title Company And Chicago Title Insurance Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, And/Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY and CHICAGE TITLE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And/Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MADISON NGUYEN VS. JAMES NGUYEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT JAMES NGUYEN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED. Non-registered process server failed to sufficiently exercise due diligence in his attempts to effectuate proper service in accordance with California laws and San Francisco Local Rules of Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GUI YAN ZHOU ET AL VS. MATTHEW WAI MA, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Wai Ma And Yolanda Mon Nam Gaws Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANTS MATTHEW WAI MA and YOLANDA MON NAM GAW's Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Complaint DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SHERRY HOOD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Monetary Sanction Request Aginst Defendant In The Amount Of $2,997.50
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2016, line 7. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Monetary Sanction Request Aginst Defendant In The Amount Of $2,997.50 GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,997.50. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN MCGUIRK VS. TAYLOR HAUGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT TAYLOR HAUGHT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith that (1) Notice of Termination of Tenancy was served on Defendants before the Notice of Intent to Withdraw was served on the Rent Board; and (2) that the Defendant was notified of the service of the Notice of Intent to Withdraw on the Rent Board. Demurer is otherwise overruled at this time. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN MCGUIRK VS. BARBARA HAUGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANTS BARBARA HAUGHT and TERRY COBLE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith that (1) Notice of Termination of Tenancy was served on Defendants before the Notice of Intent to Withdraw was served on the Rent Board; and (2) that the Defendant was notified of the service of the Notice of Intent to Withdraw on the Rent Board. Demurer is otherwise overruled at this time. = (501/REQ)
